//: Typecheck config for the Pixi v7 adapter. Same DOM lib as tsconfig.pixi.json, but the `paths` override redirects the bare `pixi.js` import to the npm-alias devDep (`pixi7` = pixi.js@7.4.3) so src/pixi7 typechecks against v7 types while tsc still EMITS `import ... from "pixi.js"` unchanged (paths affect type resolution only). The alias hoists to the WORKSPACE ROOT node_modules (verified empirically 2026-07-16 — npm placed it at ../../node_modules/pixi7, not packages/runtime/node_modules). skipLibCheck is inherited from base and restated here for the documented @webgpu/types vs lib.dom drift.
